title: Weather: Cool to warm on Thursday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Fine and warm to...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Fine and warm to hot conditions are expected today, Thursday 4 September, but partly cloudy along the east coast with isolated showers.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeWestern Cape residents can expect fine and hot weather in the north-west; otherwise, it will be partly cloudy and cool to warm.

The region’s expected UVB sunburn index is “very high.” Residents should take the necessary precautions against prolonged sun exposure.

Eastern CapeThe day will be fine and warm but partly cloudy and cool along the coast.

Eastern CapeThe day will start with morning fog in places along the escarpment; otherwise, it will be fine and warm but partly cloudy and cool along the coast.


> Expected temperatures for today:



> Forecast for Friday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
